cookies.title: Cookies & Privacy
cookies.description: We use cookies to enhance your experience and analyze our traffic. By accepting, you help us improve our services.
cookies.necessary_desc: Required for the website to function properly
cookies.analytics_desc: Help us understand how you use our site

accessibility.title: Accessibility Statement
accessibility.description: At adinfinity, we are committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We strive to make our website accessible to everyone, regardless of their abilities or assistive technology.
accessibility.wcag_description: We are actively working towards compliance with the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.2 Level AA. These guidelines explain how to make web content more accessible to people with disabilities.
accessibility.keyboard_desc: Our website is designed to be fully navigable using only a keyboard:
accessibility.screen_reader_desc: We optimize our website for popular screen readers:
accessibility.third_party: Third-party widgets or embedded content may not be fully accessible. We are working with vendors to improve this.
accessibility.animations: Some complex animations may be reduced for users who prefer reduced motion.
accessibility.pdfs: Some PDF documents may not be fully accessible. We are working to make all PDFs accessible.
accessibility.feedback_desc: We welcome feedback on the accessibility of our website. If you encounter any accessibility barriers, please let us know:
accessibility.what_to_include: What to Include in Your Feedback
accessibility.web_page: The web page address where you encountered the issue
accessibility.assistive_tech: The assistive technology you were using
accessibility.preferred_format: Your preferred format for receiving information
accessibility.eaa_desc: We comply with the European Accessibility Act, which requires that websites and mobile applications of private sector entities meet accessibility standards.
accessibility.greek_law_desc: We comply with Greek law implementing the EAA, which sets accessibility requirements for products and services in Greece.
accessibility.enforcement_desc: If you believe we have not complied with accessibility requirements, you may contact the Hellenic Data Protection Authority or other relevant enforcement bodies.
accessibility.ongoing_desc: Accessibility is an ongoing commitment at adinfinity. We regularly review and improve our website to ensure it remains accessible to all users. This accessibility statement will be updated as we make improvements and as accessibility standards evolve.
accessibility.assistance_desc: We're here to help you access our information and services.

about.description: adinfinity is the leading graphic design and advertising company in Arta. We provide innovative solutions to showcase your business.

cta.title: Let's Talk
cta.description: Contact us to discuss your next project.

mobile.description: Leading graphic design and advertising services in Arta.
